response.justification: Candidate is an experienced generalist software engineer with strong TDD, testing, and full-stack credentials, but the role requires a Senior C++ specialist with 8-12 years of focused C++/STL, industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), MQTT/IoT, and message-broker architecture experience. The resume shows only ~6 months of professional C/C++ work (National Instruments, 2014-2015) and a bachelor-thesis C++ project; the bulk of the career is in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Core requirements (SDL/IEC 62443, MQTT, industrial protocols, Azure, multi-threaded C++ systems) are not evidenced.
strengths: 14+ years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring/workshops
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby millions of HTTP req/sec)
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only a short 2014-2015 stint; no demonstrated modern C++ depth
No evidence of IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, MQTT, or industrial-automation protocol experience
No message-broker, IoT platform, or Azure cloud experience listed for the required architectural responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial cybersecurity / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general engineering craftsmanship and distributed-systems exposure
